situational_context: Running comeback day 71 (15 runs completed since May 3). On vacation in Saint-Malo (Brittany) Jul 12-27 — cooler coastal weather (GREEN band, 18-25C) enables outdoor running after weeks of Paris heatwave RED/ORANGE restrictions. Run #15 executed today in Saint-Malo (4.5 km, HR 142, suffer 30). ACWR resolved to 1.04 (was 1.35 at last digest Jun 14). Chronic load rebuilt to 19.9 from 17.5 (+14%). VO2max running improved to 41.6 (from 40.6). Training readiness dropped to 50 today (travel fatigue + heatwave strain carryover + short sleep Jul 12). HRV weekly avg 34 ms (stable but below the 37 target). Weight 103.7 kg (single Jun 21 reading, up 1 kg from Jun 14 — no recent weighing). Nutrition logging paused during vacation. Baby (Leonie, 6 months) with family in Saint-Malo.

recommendations.text: Training readiness crashed to 50 — allow 48h full recovery before next run (Wed Jul 15). The drop is consistent with travel fatigue + accumulated Paris heatwave strain, not overtraining (ACWR 1.04). Saint-Malo's cooler weather will accelerate recovery. If readiness still < 60 on Wednesday morning, postpone Run #16 to Thursday.
recommendations.measurable: Training readiness >= 70 before Run #16 on Wednesday

recommendations.text: Progress the long run to 7 km on Saturday — demonstrated tolerance up to 7.5 km (Run #12, Jun 21) with no reported issues. Saint-Malo's flat coastal paths and GREEN weather (21C) are ideal. Keep Z2 easy (FC <= 145 bpm). This is the comeback's next milestone toward 8-10 km.
recommendations.measurable: Run #17 completed at 7 km, suffer score <= 35, no tissue complaints

recommendations.text: Resume Withings weighing — last reading was Jun 21 (22 days ago). A single data point (103.7 kg) shows +1 kg vs Jun 14. Without regular weighing, TDEE recalibration (due Jul 19) is impossible and the 95 kg objective cannot be tracked.
recommendations.measurable: >= 2 Withings readings this week (bring travel scale or resume upon return)

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if readiness stays < 60 for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Crashed from 90 to 50 in 4 days — likely travel + heat strain; should recover in Saint-Malo's cooler conditions

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV weekly avg drops below 32 ms
markers_to_watch.reason: Stable at 34 ms but below the 37 target; UNBALANCED status today suggests ongoing autonomic stress

markers_to_watch.threshold: Resume tracking — no data since Jun 21
